name: Abalone
author: Michel Lalet & Laurent Levi (1987) / AGP port
description: The classic 1987 marble-pushing game on a side-5 hexagon of hexes. Slide in-line groups of 1-3 marbles; out-number an opposing line to push (sumito) it, shoving enemy marbles off the edge. Eject 6 of your opponent's marbles to win.
